statements.status_notes: Duplicate of #137195. Go stdlib crypto/tls CVE-2025-68121 in kubectl (Go 1.25.6); fixed in Go 1.24.13 / 1.25.7 / 1.26.0-rc.3. The reporter's own Trivy output lists Status='fixed'. Linked to #137195 as the tracking issue. [ref: https://github.com/kubernetes/kubernetes/issues/137228]
